payload.description: MTA Diversity Committee meeting held on March 24, 2025 at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor, New York, NY.

Three all-agency EO policy statements became effective July 1, 2025: Disabilities and Pregnancy-Related Conditions in the Workplace (11-066), Equal Employment Opportunity (11-082), and Sexual and Other Discriminatory Harassment (11-063).
All-Agency Policy Directive 11-094 Military Benefits became effective June 16, 2025, providing guidelines for administration of military leave benefits.

tool_args.label: DBE Applications Increased from Previous Year

payload.claim_text: Ms. Norman reported an increase in DBE applications compared to the previous year. Between January and December 2024, a total of 126 new DBE applications were received, and 88 of those firms were certified, averaging a processing time of 55 days.
payload.subject: DBE applications

tool_args.label: DBE Awards Participation Lower Than Last Fiscal Year

payload.claim_text: Ms. Norman reported that participation in DBE awards is lower than last fiscal year.
payload.subject: DBE awards participation
